ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, thermometer) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor for unique identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., acceleration, temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceleration_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "epoc" INTEGER /* Epoch time in milliseconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.SSS */,
  "elapsed" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* Acceleration in the x-axis direction */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Acceleration in the y-axis direction */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Acceleration in the z-axis direction */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the acceleration data (e.g., m/s²) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceleration_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceleration_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "epoc" INTEGER /* Epoch time in milliseconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.SSS */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the temperature data (e.g., °C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being deployed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the deployment */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of the deployment */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the deployment */,
  "deployment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the deployment ends or was decommissioned */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
